import{t as e}from"./preload-helper-DMFyOM8X.js";import{r as t}from"./chunk-C65VWZLV-1bJzG5ow.js";var n=`1.0`;function r(e,t){return{schemaId:`dux_website_events/1.3`,payload:{eventType:`human_signal`,pageViewToken:e,humanSignalApiVersion:n,humanSignalWebdriverDetected:t.wd,humanSignalUserAgent:t.ua,humanSignalCanvasNormal:t.cf,humanSignalBrowserNormal:t.be,humanSignalNaturalMouse:t.nm,humanSignalNaturalClicks:t.nc,humanSignalKeyboardActivity:t.ka,humanSignalScrollActivity:t.sa,humanSignalTouchActivity:t.ta,humanSignalSignificantTime:t.pt,humanSignalMultiplePages:t.mp,humanSignalSessionReasonable:t.sd}}}var i=function(n,i){if(n.denormalizedDux){var a=null,o=!1,s=function(){if(!(o||!a||!i.pageViewToken||!n.denormalizedDux)){var e=r(i.pageViewToken,a);n.denormalizedDux(e,{flush:!0}),o=!0}};t([[`beforeunload`,s,window,!0],[`unload`,s,window,!0],[`pagehide`,s,window,!0]]),e(()=>import(`./dist-BO9oLJ8l.js`),[]).then(function(e){var t=e.initSHS;t({shopId:Number(i.shopId)||0,beaconEndpoint:null,debug:i.mode===`development`,onSignalUpdate:function(e){a=e}})}).catch(function(){})}};export{i as initHumanSignalTracking};
